positive: A symmetrical, intricate cosmic mandala featuring bioluminescent tropical flora and abstract celestial geometry. The design should incorporate stylized, interwoven elements of mandalas, nebulae, and botanical life (such as glowing vines and lotus flowers). Use a high contrast palette of deep sapphire blue, midnight black, electric cyan, and metallic gold highlights. The style must be highly detailed, clean vector art, inspired by Art Nouveau and Neo-Mystic aesthetics. Composition must be centered and perfectly balanced, designed for optimal, single-color screen printing or textile printing. Ensure crisp, solid silhouettes and sharp edges throughout the entire composition, resembling high-end esoteric tattoo flash art.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, grain, noise, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, bad lines, cartoon, messy, realistic, photo, blurry edges
